intent: Maximize information gain on the first guess by using four distinct colors, which splits the 1296 candidates into many small buckets (highest entropy).
rationale: Starting with four different colors (red, blue, green, yellow) to maximize information. This guess has the highest expected information (~3.06 bits) and splits the 1296 candidates into many small groups, with the largest bucket being only 312 codes. This will efficiently narrow down the possibilities regardless of the feedback.

planner_trace.goal: Solve Mastermind: infer the hidden code from exact and partial feedback while using as few guesses as possible.

legal_actions.description: Guess the hidden code as exactly 4 symbols from the allowed color list. Repeated symbols are allowed.

intent: Guess a high-entropy probe that is also a candidate code, maximizing information gain to narrow down the 13 remaining candidates efficiently.
rationale: With 13 candidates remaining, I need a guess that splits them evenly. 'orange, red, purple, yellow' has the highest expected information (3.24 bits) and is itself a candidate code. It partitions the set into many small buckets (largest bucket size 2), so whatever feedback we get, we'll narrow down to at most 2 candidates. This is an efficient probe that could also be the answer.
